title: Subagents, Parallelism, and Coordination · Mastery Check
summary: Coordinate specialist agents without duplicate or conflicting work. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a bounded multi-agent execution map. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Delegate only concrete independent work with a clear return contract.
Give a subagent the minimum context required without losing governing constraints.
Coordinate shared files, locks, messages, and ownership boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Bounded agent-loop portfolio. No external effects occur in this browser lab."""

from dataclasses import dataclass

# Add explicit state, stop, recovery, and evidence increments below.

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process
steps.instruction: Order the Delegation Fit evidence cycle before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Delegation Fit assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Delegate only concrete independent work with a clear return contract. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: loops subagents. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Delegation Fit, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a bounded multi-agent execution map.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: More agents always finish a task faster. This fails the Delegation Fit contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: Anthropic Building Effective Agents (Current architecture guidance) — Controls workflow-agent distinctions and simple composable agent patterns.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Delegate only concrete independent work with a clear return contract.

Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Coordination Cost applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Compare parallel speedup with communication, merge, and review cost.
